content.question: What is the causal contribution of tracking age alone versus the causal contribution of the free school choice system and teacher-recommendation procedures in generating Hungary's high between-school inequality and ethnic segregation?
content.reduction_path: Conduct a regression-discontinuity or natural-experiment analysis within Hungary exploiting variation in school-selection policies across municipalities or over time; separately quantify the effects of tracking age, choice regime, and recommendation bias on segregation and achievement gaps.
